name: polymarket-scan
prompt:
Run your complete weekly Polymarket scan now.

1. Pull active markets across three categories: AI/tech, crypto, macro/geopolitical.
2. For each category, surface top 3–5 markets by volume and flag any with 10%+ probability shifts since last week.
3. Deliver the formatted summary to Telegram via send_message.
4. Write the full analysis to Obsidian at wiki/synthesis/polymarket-scan-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
